Pass.title: Salami Pass
Pass.description: A pre-generated pass for a specific person to claim salami.

name.description: The name of the person the pass is for.

token.description: The unique token to validate the pass.

isUsed.description: Whether the pass has already been used.

Claim.title: Salami Claim
Claim.description: A record of a successful salami claim.

name.description: The name of the person who claimed.

amount.description: The amount won from the wheel.

bkashNumber.description: The bKash number to pay the salami to.

passToken.description: The token used for this claim (if any).

/claims/{claimId}.description: Collection of salami claims to be processed.
